refresh_prices.name: Refresh prices
refresh_prices.description: Manually triggers an update of fuel prices from the API.

refresh_prices_failed.message: Refresh failed for one or more entries: {entry_ids}.

coordinator_auth_failed.message: Authentication failed for {entry_title} when updating fuel data.

coordinator_connectivity_failed.message: Could not reach the Queensland fuel price API for {entry_title}.

user.title: QLD Service Station Prices setup
user.description: Configure the stations and fuels to track. All instances are based on a Home Assistant Zone.

data_description.enable_geo_entities: Creates one geo_location entity per in-range station and tracked fuel type (in addition to existing price sensors). The entity registry can grow quickly; stations are added or removed when the zone radius or fuel list changes. On the Map card, add geolocation source "qld_servo_price" once instead of listing each entity under Entities.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure QLD Service Station Prices
reconfigure.description: Update the zone, radius, fuel types, or update interval for this instance.

data_description.enable_geo_entities: Creates one geo_location entity per in-range station and tracked fuel type (in addition to existing price sensors). The entity registry can grow quickly; stations are added or removed when the zone radius or fuel list changes. On the Map card, add geolocation source "qld_servo_price" once instead of listing each entity under Entities.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect QLD Service Station Prices
reauth_confirm.description: Your data consumer token needs to be re-authenticated.

error.zone_not_found: The selected zone could not be found. Please choose a valid Home Assistant Zone.
error.location_entity_not_found: The selected location entity could not be found.
error.location_entity_missing_coordinates: The selected location entity does not provide latitude and longitude attributes.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Queensland fuel price API.

auth_update_failed.title: Authentication failed for {entry_title}
auth_update_failed.description: The configured data consumer token is no longer accepted by the Queensland fuel price API. Reauthenticate this integration entry.

connectivity_update_failed.title: Connectivity issue for {entry_title}
connectivity_update_failed.description: The integration could not reach the Queensland fuel price API. Check connectivity and retry.
